description: I’m an entrepreneur with more than 20 years of product management, technology leadership and senior executive experience. Before Ermetic, I served as the co-founder and CEO of Secdo, a cyber security company, where I led the company from its inception to a successful acquisition by Palo Alto Networks (NSDQ:PANW) for $100M in only three years. Before Secdo, I served as the CEO of Integrity-Project, a company specialized in connectivity, networking and security solutions. I led them to significant growth and an acquisition by Mellanox (NSDQ:MLNX). I also served for 10 years as an officer in the IDF Intelligence Corps Unit 8200, where I held a variety of roles in management and product development, and won several national awards for excellence. I am a graduate of the Talpiot program and earned an MBA from Tel Aviv University.
